overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The character passes through a wooden gate and continues through sunlit fields and forests, transitioning from dense woodland to open meadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail entrance with wooden gate structure

events.description: passing through the wooden gate structure into the wooded trail

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward and through the wooden gate, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: rustic wooden gate with vertical posts marking the trail entrance
weathered wooden fence running alongside the path
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall coniferous trees forming a dense forest boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Geralt approaching a rustic wooden gate on a forest trail. Sunlight filters through the trees, casting dappled shadows on the dirt path. The character walks through the gate structure, transitioning from the entrance into the denser woodland area.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooded trail with dense undergrowth and approaching landmark tree

events.description: large gnarled tree with twisted branches becomes prominent in the center of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the winding dirt path, approaching the large distinctive tree in the distance

entered.detail: massive ancient tree with twisted bare branches and thick trunk
continuation of the wooden fence now visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Walking through the forested trail, the camera follows Geralt as the wooden gate recedes behind. The path winds through dense vegetation with a large, gnarled landmark tree becoming increasingly prominent ahead. The wooden fence shifts from left to right as the trail curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from dense forest to open meadow

events.description: passing the large gnarled tree on the right, entering open countryside with distant hills visible

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past the large tree and continuing into the more open landscape with distant views

entered.detail: expansive grassy meadow opening up on both sides of the path
rolling hills visible on the horizon beyond the trees

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up as Geralt passes the massive gnarled tree, which falls behind on the right. The trail continues through transitioning landscape where dense forest gives way to open meadows. Distant hills become visible on the horizon under the bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural path through rolling meadows

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the path through open grassland with scattered trees and distant structures visible

entered.detail: individual deciduous trees dotting the open landscape
flock of birds circling in the sky above the field

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through wide-open countryside with expansive grasslands stretching to the horizon. The wooden fence and dense forest have receded, replaced by scattered trees and open skies. The path continues straight through the rural landscape toward distant hills.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a shaded forest trail into a vast, sun-drenched rural landscape. It begins with Geralt approaching and passing through a rustic wooden gate, where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy onto a dirt path. As the gate recedes, the camera follows the character through denser woodland and winding vegetation, centering on a large, gnarled landmark tree that looms ahead. The environment then opens up as the massive tree falls behind to the right, shifting the scenery from thick forest to transitioning meadows with distant hills appearing on the horizon. Finally, the landscape expands into wide-open countryside, where the dense woods are replaced by expansive grasslands and scattered trees under a bright midday sky.
